page_subtitle: History of updates and improvements to the application
footer: Zenith PMS · All versions since Jan. 2026

2.8.0.title: Purchase price history
items: Purchase price evolution chart in the "Purchases" tab of each product
% variation indicator (up ▲ / down ▼ / stable →) between first and last purchase
Min (green) and max (red) reference lines on the chart
Supplier filter to compare price curves
"What's new" page — this changelog visible in the application
Pylance error "Cannot access attribute replace for class Unbound" in fournisseurs.py

2.7.0.title: Supplier Dashboard & Expiration Alerts
items: Supplier statistics dashboard: total debt, top 5, due dates, 6-month trend
Critical expiration alert popup on login (sound + persistent toast)
7 / 14 / 30 day filter on the expiration alerts dashboard widget
Expiration popup: chart disappeared when selecting a supplier

2.6.0.title: Financial Module & Reports
items: Margin variation report with detection of atypical margins
Temporal sales analysis (hourly / weekly heatmap)
Seller ranking with performance score
Interactive financial guide with explained KPI indicators
Reduced financial module loading time (4h cache)

2.5.0.title: Advanced Stock Management
items: Free Units (UG) report by supplier and period
Exportable inventory states (PDF / Excel)
Stock shortage tracking with automatic alerts
Shelf replenishment: counter badge in sidebar
Dormant stock calculation fixed for products without last movement date

2.4.0.title: Orders & Suppliers
items: Automatic order scheduler
Restocking suggestions based on sales over the last 30/60/90 days
Supplier catalogue with calculated margin per product
Free units not factored into effective cost
